project_type: Go monorepo with panel API server and node agent binary
test_framework: go test with standard testing package, tests alongside code (e.g., engine_test.go, wireguard_test.go)
verification_instructions: 1) go build ./... must pass with no errors. 2) go test ./... must pass all tests. 3) New code must integrate with existing patterns.
setup_instructions: Go 1.22+ is pre-installed. Run go build ./... to verify deps are downloaded.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. No Docker needed for this Go project. No database available for integration tests - use unit tests only.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing code patterns in the codebase. Module path is 'koris-next'. Imports use paths like 'koris-next/panel/internal/...' and 'koris-next/node/internal/...'
key_patterns: API handlers are methods on *Server struct in panel/internal/api/api.go. Routes registered in Routes() method. Helper funcs: writeJSON, writeJSONCode, writeError, pathID. Node agent uses Push struct posted to /api/node/push. Tasks polled via /api/node/tasks/poll and executed in executeTask switch. Events created via s.createEvent(). Auth: requireAdmin middleware. WireGuard keys in panel/internal/wireguard/keygen.go.
directory_structure: panel/ - panel server code (internal/api, internal/wireguard, internal/templates, cmd/panel, migrations). node/ - node agent (cmd/node, internal/config, internal/logger, internal/updater). scripts/ - shell scripts (openvpn/, logrotate/). go.mod at root with module 'koris-next'.
